name: hexa-native
description: PreToolUse(Write|Edit|NotebookEdit) hard block for `.py` / `.sh` writes inside any project whose root contains a `project.hexa` marker. Walks up parent dirs of the target file path; if `project.hexa` is found, the write is denied with a message redirecting the operator to `.hexa` (since `.py` / `.sh` are already supported as ai-native English elsewhere). NO opt-out: no env var, no config file, no exception list — hard-coded enforcement by design. Targets only `.py` / `.sh`; other extensions pass through. Non-hexa-native projects (no `project.hexa` marker) are unaffected.
